title: Smart Loops - Combining Iteration and Logic
description: Combine loops and conditionals for powerful automation - master advanced algorithmic thinking.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: The real power comes from combining loops with conditionals! Loop through many items, but only process the ones that meet certain criteria.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Like: loop through all plots, but only harvest the ones that are ready?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Perfect example! Use a for loop with an if statement inside to filter what gets processed!

objectives.description: Create a loop with an if statement inside
Add conditional logic inside the loop

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Selective processing! The loop checks every item but only acts on some!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: This pattern is everywhere in real programming!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: When you find what you're looking for, why keep looping? Use 'break' to exit the loop early!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I check with an if statement, and if the condition is met, I break out?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! This is the search-and-stop pattern. Very efficient!

objectives.description: Use if inside a loop with break

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Conditionals control when the loop stops!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Sometimes you want to skip an iteration without stopping the whole loop. Use 'continue' to jump to the next iteration!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So: if this plot is already harvested, continue to the next one?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Continue says 'skip the rest of this iteration and move to the next one.'

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Break exits the loop, continue skips to the next iteration!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: You've got it! These are essential loop control tools!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Final challenge! Create an adaptive farming algorithm that combines loops and conditionals for intelligent farming!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Harvest 15 wheat crops using loops with conditional logic! Use your loop to check each plot and make smart decisions. This is real algorithmic thinking!

objectives.description: Harvest 15 wheat crops with loops and conditionals

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I built a complete intelligent farming algorithm!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Outstanding! You've mastered loops and conditionals. Ready for the ultimate challenge—the master quest?

rewards.description: Unlocked quest: The Automated Farm Empire
